perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with glasses and a checkered flat cap is sitting in a car, looking thoughtful and then talking to someone off-camera. (2) The scene transitions to the man walking toward the entrance of a mobile phone store named 'miko'. (3) Inside the store, the man stands in front of displays, gesturing with his hands and pointing to his head while explaining deals. (4) The video cuts to close-up static shots of various product boxes: iPhone 16 Pro Max, Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra, iPad 9th Gen, and Huawei Watch GT5, each overlaid with price and saving information. (5) The man returns to the screen, gesturing toward the camera to encourage viewers to check the links.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic electronic background music starts immediately. A female voice asks a question off-camera followed by a male voice responding in an excited, helpful tone. (2) The male voice continues continuously with high energy, explaining a promotional event. (3) Sharp 'swoosh' and 'ding' sound effects punctuate the transitions between different product price reveals. (4) The music maintains a constant tempo until the end where the male voice gives a final call to action.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles translate the spoken dialogue throughout the video. (2) Decorative/Effect Text: Variety-show style hooks appear such as '#煩惱的時刻' (Worrying moment) in pink, '母親節要到了' (Mother's Day is coming), and '#根本是天注定!' (It's fate!). (3) Large orange and white text displays '5大優惠' (5 big deals). Specific product names and prices appear in bold yellow and white text against darkened backgrounds, e.g., 'iPhone 16 pro max 256GB' and '省4710元' (Save 4710 dollars).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro in car -> Movement to store -> Detailed list of promotional offers -> Outro with CTA

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator (3c Tim) visible throughout; a female voice is heard but she remains behind the camera.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An adult male wearing a white T-shirt with the text 'MAY THE FORCE BE WITH YOU', a black and white checkered flat cap, black-rimmed glasses, a yellow watch, and beaded bracelets.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video starts inside a modern car interior. It transitions to the exterior and interior of a 'miko' mobile phone shop, featuring bright white lighting, glass shelves filled with smartphone boxes, and brand logos (SAMSUNG, vivo, OPPO) in the background.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Natural light in car, bright overhead studio-style lighting in the store

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear -> List-based: Hook -> Contextual Transition -> Feature List -> Call to Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional advertisement for a retail chain called 'miko' (米可手機). It uses the upcoming Mother's Day as a thematic 'hook' to present a list of five specific deals on high-end technology (iPhones, Samsung flagships, iPads, and Huawei watches) to drive traffic to the store.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator specifically names the store 'miko', visits the physical location, and lists price-specific promotions available there.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: 3c Tim's signature flat cap and tech-enthusiast persona.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses typical short-form video marketing techniques: fast cuts, bright captions, and high-energy narration to maintain viewer retention.
